Preferences

Stack Controls how many stack frames stay visible in the sidebar.
Display Mode Changes the number formatting used throughout the UI.
Precision Applies to `Fix`, `Sci`, and `Eng` formatting.
RPN entry panel
FIX P6
0

RPN flow: build number, press Enter, then apply an operation from the keypad or ribbon.

Stack

RAD

    Post Fix Pro
    Matrix Builder
    Calculator Help
    Scripting Workspace

    Batch Script

    Interactive Console

    Ready.

    Use command-style RPN scripts. Numbers push automatically, commands use current calculator names, and memory-backed variables use `store A`, `recall A`, and `memclear A`.

    Examples: `2 3 add`, `12 store A clear_all recall A`, `display sci`, `precision 8`, `[1 2; 3 4] determinant`.
